key_insight: Translate word-problem quantities into variables and equations before solving
method: Name each unknown quantity with a single variable
Write one equation per stated relation
check: Substitute back into the original word problem

key_insight: Reduce expressions modulo small primes to constrain or verify integer solutions
method: Pick a small modulus that simplifies the expression
Reduce both sides and compare residues
Use the residue constraint to prune cases
check: Re-verify the final solution under the original equation

key_insight: Systematically split into exhaustive cases and verify each independently
method: Partition the problem by a clarifying property
Combine the results without double counting
check: Confirm the cases cover all possibilities and do not overlap

key_insight: Identify and leverage algebraic or geometric symmetry to simplify the problem
method: Detect an invariance under relabelling or reflection
Replace the symmetric block with one canonical representative
Multiply by the orbit size when counting
check: Confirm the symmetry preserves the constraints used

key_insight: Consider boundary or extremal configurations to establish bounds or find optima
method: Examine the configuration at its extreme
Use the extreme as a witness or contradiction
check: Confirm the extremal candidate satisfies all constraints
